description: FROZEN contract for `focr runs` output and the `focr sync` JSONL audit stream (bd-wp8.11). Drift against this fixture is a CI failure (tests/cli_robot_golden.rs: runs_schema_contract_over_populated_store). Versioned by hand, like robot_schema_v1.json.

record.notes: One run record. The SAME shape is used by `runs --format ndjson` (one object per line), by the `runs` field of `runs --format json`, and by every `sync export-jsonl` line — one contract, three carriers.

runs_json_wrapper.notes: `runs --format json` emits ONE document: `runs` is an array of record objects, `count` equals its length. Empty history is exit 0 with count 0 and an empty array (agent-ergonomics Axiom 5: no-results is success).

sync_contract.notes: Export is the canonical direction (locked, atomic temp+fsync+rename, idempotent byte-identical for identical history). Import is additive/restorative replay keyed by run_id — NEVER a bidirectional merge; an import cannot silently overwrite live history beyond replacing records with the same run_id.
